Bosch Diesel s.r.o. (BBM): TNS deviates -9.4% vs PY while CF assumed +5.1%. AI sanity check: verify volume postings for Powertrain Solutions before MBR submission.
Bosch (China) Investment Ltd. (BBM): inventory days-on-hand at 78 days, +9 days vs PY. Early warning for NWC target deviation in Q3.
Robert Bosch LLC (BBI): EBIT margin 320bps below Business Plan. Under-absorption from order intake decline; GM review recommended before approval.
BSH Hausgeraete GmbH (BBG): Sales cost +7.8% vs CF, driven by campaign spend. Check accrual completeness for May.
Bosch Limited (BBE): CAPEX YTD at 31% of FY plan vs 42% phasing assumption. Confirm project timeline shifts with controlling.
Robert Bosch Elektronika Kft. (BBM): one-off other operating income EUR 4.2m (asset disposal). Exclude from run-rate in CF narrative.
